name: Sword Game
short_description: Multiplayer. Versus. Co-op. Achievements. Stage-making. Swords. These are all words. And by random chance they also happen to describe all the major features of Sword Game, a free Action-Party game where up to 4 players can have a grand old time slashing and stabbing each other or CPUs.
detailed_description:
Multiplayer. Versus. Co-op. Achievements. Stage-making. Swords. These are all words. And by random chance they also happen to describe all the major features of Sword Game, a free Action-Party game where up to 4 players can have a grand old time slashing and stabbing each other or CPUs. In addition, by an equally peculiar coincidence, none of those words contain the letter Q. Now that is odd.

Duke it out with your friends locally or online (sort of?) via Steam Remote Play.
Gamepads recommended, but keyboard controls are supported for player 1 (enabled in options).
